steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to 'specify when al-Biruni published his landmass theory.' The relevant note is: al-Biruni published his landmass theory in 1037 CE. A correct answer must include the year 1037 CE and connect it clearly to the publication of the landmass theory.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In 1037 CE, al-Biruni published his theory that a large landmass existed west of Europe and east of Asia.: names the year 1037 CE and states that he published the landmass theory then. ✓
  • Choice B — Al-Biruni, who studied Earth's physical features, published a theory about a large landmass.: omits the year 1037 CE entirely. ✗
  • Choice C — Al-Biruni was an Iranian scholar who studied Earth's physical features.: does not mention the landmass theory or the publication date. ✗
  • Choice D — An Iranian scholar who studied Earth's physical features, al-Biruni theorized that a large landmass existed west of Europe and east of Asia.: describes the theory but omits when it was published. ✗
That matches Choice A — In 1037 CE, al-Biruni published his theory that a large landmass existed west of Europe and east of Asia..
